title: Friesodielsia korthalsiana
taxonomy: Friesodielsia korthalsiana is a species of plant in the family Annonaceae. It is native to Borneo and is classified as a flowering plant. The plant belongs to the genus Friesodielsia, which is part of the larger family Annonaceae. Friesodielsia korthalsiana is a type of evergreen shrub or small tree that grows in the tropical forests of Borneo. The plant is further classified into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Magnoliales, and family Annonaceae.
